strengths: 17+ years of software engineering across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure exceeds the 15-year requirement
Proven entrepreneurial track record founding GISCollective and contributing to multiple startups (WatchUp, RIDE Capital, Apon) demonstrates initiative and adaptability
Currently engaged with AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing active involvement with emerging AI technologies
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI/ML; undergraduate degrees are in general CS and photography/design, not AI-focused fields
Limited evidence of building or shipping AI-powered products or platforms; recent AI experience is infrastructure-focused (MCP tooling) rather than strategic product work
Cloud and AI platform strategy expertise appears secondary; background is primarily full-stack development rather than cloud/AI product vision or strategic advisory work
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the 15-year experience minimum and brings valuable entrepreneurial background, but lacks the preferred advanced AI degree and demonstrated expertise in AI-powered products required for this director-level role. While his current infrastructure work with AI agents is relevant, the position requires strategic AI product vision and cloud platform strategy at a principal level—skills not evidenced in his full-stack development and startup-building background.
